meaning: n.肺(活)量测定(法),呼吸量测定(法)
examples: Spirometry was performed on all eligible participants.
This test may be performed if your symptoms and spirometry test do not clearly show asthma.
During this test, you inhale increasing amounts of methacholine aerosol mist before and after spirometry.
In future studies, Sims says that the researchers should diagnose COPD using a breathing test called spirometry.
